prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of ZTS (Zoetis), the stock typically exhibits moderate volatility with annualized volatility around 20-25%. For an 18-day forecast, I applied a geometric Brownian motion model assuming slight positive drift typical of large-cap healthcare stocks. The confidence intervals reflect increasing uncertainty over the 18-day period, with the stock potentially moving within a 5-10% range at 90% confidence. ZTS as a defensive healthcare stock tends to have lower volatility than broader market indices.
